features.name: Spider Climb
features.description: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Pest - Tiny climbing creature with minimal threat
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Spider Climb to reach inaccessible locations
tactical_info.key_abilities: Spider Climb allows ceiling and wall traversal
tactical_info.weaknesses: Extremely low stats across the board, minimal HP
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for environmental flavor, familiars, or swarm components
